subcodes.first_line: Upon the grandeur of this Day hath God borne witness in all the Sacred Books. Ponder that which the All-Merciful hath revealed in the Qur'án [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بر عظمت این یوم حق در جمیع کتب شهادت داده تفکر فیما انزله الرحمن فی الفرقان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
